# Beudox HR Management System - Technical Context

## Architecture Overview

Beudox HR is a modern React-based single-page application (SPA) built with TypeScript, featuring a comprehensive HR management system. The application follows a client-server architecture with Supabase providing backend services.

### Frontend Architecture
- **Framework**: React 18 with TypeScript
- **Build Tool**: Vite with SWC for fast compilation
- **Routing**: React Router v6 with protected routes and role-based access control
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS with custom design tokens and dark mode support
- **State Management**: React Query for server state, Context API for global state
- **Form Handling**: React Hook Form with Zod schema validation
- **UI Components**: shadcn/ui built on Radix UI primitives

### Backend Architecture
- **Platform**: Supabase (PostgreSQL + Auth + Edge Functions)
- **Database**: PostgreSQL with Row Level Security (RLS)
- **Authentication**: Supabase Auth with custom user roles
- **API**: RESTful endpoints via Supabase client and edge functions
- **File Storage**: Supabase Storage for documents and images

## Key Design Patterns

### Component Organization
- **Atomic Design**: Components organized by complexity (atoms, molecules, organisms)
- **Feature-based Structure**: Components grouped by business domain
- **Composition over Inheritance**: Extensive use of render props and compound components

### Data Flow
- **Server State**: Managed by React Query with optimistic updates
- **Local State**: useState/useReducer for component-specific state
- **Global State**: Context providers for theme, auth, and app-wide settings

### Role-Based Access Control
- **Route Protection**: ProtectedRoute component with role checking
- **Component-Level Permissions**: canAccess utility function
- **Data Filtering**: RLS policies and client-side filtering based on user role

## Database Schema

### Core Entities
- **companies**: Multi-tenant company management
- **employees**: User profiles with role assignments
- **departments**: Organizational structure
- **projects**: Project management with team assignments
- **evaluations**: Performance review system (quarterly + daily)
- **leave_requests**: Leave management with approval workflows
- **payroll_records**: Salary processing and history
- **invoices**: Client billing and payment tracking
- **expenses**: Company expense management

### Key Relationships
- Employees belong to companies and departments
- Projects have many employees (many-to-many)
- Evaluations reference employees and evaluators
- Leave requests have approval chains
- Payroll records link to employees and companies

## Business Logic

### Evaluation System
- **Quarterly Evaluations**: Comprehensive performance reviews with scoring
- **Daily Evaluations**: Quick feedback system with directional ratings
- **Visibility Rules**: Role-based access to evaluation data
- **Timeline View**: Chronological display of all evaluations

### Leave Management
- **Balance Calculation**: Automatic accrual and usage tracking
- **Approval Workflows**: Configurable approval chains
- **Calendar Integration**: Holiday and working day calculations
- **Policy Enforcement**: Configurable leave types and rules

### Payroll Processing
- **Automated Calculations**: Base salary + OT + bonuses - deductions
- **Multi-currency Support**: PKR with formatting utilities
- **Historical Tracking**: Complete payroll history with adjustments
- **PDF Generation**: Payslip generation via edge functions

### Financial Analytics
- **Trend Analysis**: 6-month rolling financial metrics
- **Expense Tracking**: Monthly expense categorization
- **Invoice Management**: Client billing with PDF generation
- **Chart Visualization**: Recharts integration for data display

## Integration Points

### Supabase Services
- **Authentication**: User login/signup with email verification
- **Database**: PostgreSQL with real-time subscriptions
- **Storage**: File uploads for avatars, documents, and exports
- **Edge Functions**: Serverless functions for PDF generation and email sending

### External APIs
- **Email Service**: SMTP integration via Supabase
- **PDF Generation**: Server-side PDF creation for invoices and payslips
- **File Processing**: Document upload and processing

## Development Workflow

### Code Quality
- **TypeScript**: Strict type checking enabled
- **ESLint**: Code linting with React-specific rules
- **Testing**: Vitest for unit tests, Playwright for E2E
- **Code Formatting**: Consistent formatting standards

### Build Process
- **Development**: Hot module replacement with Vite
- **Production**: Optimized builds with code splitting
- **Deployment**: Static hosting with CDN distribution

## Security Considerations

### Authentication
- **JWT Tokens**: Secure token-based authentication
- **Session Management**: Automatic token refresh
- **Password Policies**: Strong password requirements

### Data Protection
- **Row Level Security**: Database-level access control
- **Input Validation**: Client and server-side validation
- **SQL Injection Prevention**: Parameterized queries

### Access Control
- **Role-based Permissions**: Granular permission system
- **Route Protection**: Client-side route guards
- **API Security**: Secure API endpoints with authentication

## Performance Optimizations

### Frontend
- **Code Splitting**: Route-based and component-based splitting
- **Lazy Loading**: Dynamic imports for heavy components
- **Memoization**: React.memo and useMemo for expensive operations
- **Virtual Scrolling**: For large lists and tables

### Backend
- **Database Indexing**: Optimized queries with proper indexing
- **Caching**: React Query caching and Supabase caching
- **Edge Functions**: Globally distributed serverless functions

## Scalability Features

### Multi-tenancy
- **Company Isolation**: Data scoped by company_id
- **Shared Resources**: Efficient resource sharing across tenants
- **Scalable Architecture**: Horizontal scaling capabilities

### Real-time Updates
- **Live Data**: Real-time subscriptions for collaborative features
- **Optimistic Updates**: Immediate UI feedback with rollback on errors
- **Conflict Resolution**: Handling concurrent data modifications

## Monitoring & Analytics

### Error Tracking
- **Client-side Errors**: Comprehensive error boundaries
- **API Error Handling**: Consistent error responses
- **Logging**: Structured logging for debugging

### Performance Monitoring
- **Bundle Analysis**: Webpack bundle analyzer integration
- **Core Web Vitals**: Performance metric tracking
- **User Analytics**: Usage pattern analysis

## Future Enhancements

### Planned Features
- **Mobile App**: React Native companion app
- **Advanced Reporting**: Custom report builder
- **Integration APIs**: Third-party HR system integrations
- **AI Features**: Automated evaluation insights
- **Workflow Automation**: Custom approval workflows

### Technical Improvements
- **Micro-frontends**: Modular architecture for large teams
- **GraphQL**: More efficient data fetching
- **Offline Support**: Progressive Web App features
- **Advanced Caching**: Service worker implementation
